subject: Sync docker image images with docker-manifest.csv
commit_message:
Sync docker image images with docker-manifest.csv

Update the docker image versions in the OOM helm charts
with the versions specified in the docker-manifest.csv
in the integration repo.

This is as of integration repo commit
ed53a301dbeaad568b21b9545cb9ce6c5c040b29

Change-Id: Ib844402ff9f3bdecfbd8e9f474eaac1561aff5b0
Issue-ID: OOM-1053
Signed-off-by: Gary Wu <gary.i.wu@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

This was split from https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/46451/.

Patch Set 1:

Huabing and Shentao, can you comment on your respective docker image versions?

Patch Set 1:

I think it is time that we create version 2.0.0 of kube2msb

Patch Set 1:

Sounds like for the time being we should update kube2msb in the manifest to "latest".  Any ideas on uui-server?

Patch Set 2:

kube2msb changed to latest in the manifest: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/46641/

Patch Set 3:

Here are the latest outstanding differences between the manifest and the helm charts.

Patch Set 4:

3 of the 4 pods come up with the docker image changes in this patch. If the image is correct for the uui-server, then perhaps the failure to start is configuration related.
If so, we can merge this patch and raise a defect against the UUI team to investigate further.

dev-dmaap-bus-controller-86c48647b7-cjdmr       1/1       Running            0          3h        10.42.78.98     sb6-k8s-3
dev-portal-cassandra-5ddbc59ffd-kpxt6           1/1       Running            0          3h        10.42.66.156    sb6-k8s-1
dev-uui-99f94f9d4-ntbtv                                 1/1       Running            0          5h        10.42.223.96    sb6-k8s-1
dev-uui-server-8cd99f7b9-b69wp                  0/1       CrashLoopBackOff   67         5h        10.42.68.233    sb6-k8s-2

Here are the logs for the uui-server that fails to start:

Patch Set 4:

Are we ok to merge this for now?  There are other incoming changes to the manifest.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Yes.  LGTM.
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda
